summary.en: An AI agent that consolidates operational status, generates standard reports, and orchestrates alerts and actions—streamlining situation management through natural language.
summary.ko: An AI agent that consolidates operational status, generates standard reports, and orchestrates alerts and actions—streamlining situation management through natural language.
summary.ja: 運用ステータスを統合し、標準レポートを生成し、アラートとアクションをオーケストレーションするAIエージェント。自然言語で状況管理を効率化します。

title.en: AIP Use Case: Reporting & Incident Management AI Agent
